name: srmech
summary: Stored-Relationship Mechanism: the 14-class A-N primitive vocabulary in native C + Python, numpy-optional. Every continuous-math op (trig, exp, sqrt, FFT, SVD, eig) is a cascade of the 14; the native build holds no libm. The One, S(sigma,theta), generates the 1+3+7+3 = 14 substrate -- the C/H/O Hurwitz ladder = so(8) + Spin(8) triality (Fix(tau)=g_2=14), bit-exact cascade-vs-matrix. Full C/Python cascade-catalog parity; AMSC (MPR v1).
author: Steven Kirkland
